note: Maine Turnpike (I-95 mm 0-109) plazas are run by the Turnpike Authority; Kennebunk (mm 25) is the plaza closest to Wells. North of Bangor plan fuel carefully - Irving Big Stops and Dysart's dominate. The Baileyville Irving Big Stop is OFF the interstate network (US-1/Route 9 near Calais) and is not listed below. Maine I-95 exits are milepost-based. I-295 has no plazas; use the West Gardiner plaza at its northern end (I-95 mm 102).

stops.name: Kittery Welcome Center (Maine Visitor Info) Rest Area (NB only)
stops.notes: Northbound, just past NH line; truck parking, no fuel

stops.name: Weigh Station (NB)
stops.notes: Maine State Police scale and inspection site, northbound around mm 5.5; PrePass not accepted

stops.name: Kennebunk Service Plazas (both directions)
stops.notes: NB and SB Maine Turnpike plazas; 24-hour fuel, food, truck parking; closest plaza to Wells

stops.name: Cumberland Service Plaza (NB only)
stops.notes: Northbound Maine Turnpike plaza; fuel, food, truck parking

stops.name: Gray Service Plaza (SB only)
stops.notes: Southbound Maine Turnpike plaza; fuel, food, truck parking

stops.name: West Gardiner Service Plaza (both directions)
stops.notes: At the I-95/I-295 toll junction, serves both directions and both routes; fuel, food, truck parking

stops.name: Pilot Travel Center
stops.notes: Whitten Rd area off Exit 109; verify location before relying on it

stops.name: Dysart's Travel Stop
stops.notes: Somerset Ave at Exit 150; smaller sister location to the Hermon Dysart's

stops.name: Irving Circle K (Big Stop)
stops.notes: US-2/ME-7 at Exit 157; fuel and parking, verify Big Stop services

stops.name: Hampden Rest Areas (both directions)
stops.notes: NB and SB just south of Bangor; truck parking, no fuel

stops.name: Dysart's Truck Stop & Restaurant
stops.notes: Coldbrook Rd at Exit 180; iconic 24-hour full-service truck stop, restaurant, large lot, scales, service shop

stops.name: Best Western White House Inn
stops.notes: Truck parking verified: trucker-oriented hotel on Dysart's truck stop property at Exit 180; Trucker Path-listed hotel, reviews confirm big-rig access via Dysart's lot

stops.name: Medway Rest Area (both directions)
stops.notes: South of the Exit 244 interchange; truck parking, no fuel; seasonal closures possible

stops.name: Irving Big Stop
stops.notes: ME-157 at Exit 244, gateway to Millinocket/Katahdin; last major fuel before Houlton

stops.name: Irving Big Stop / Circle K
stops.notes: US-2/Ludlow Rd at Exit 302; last stop before the Canadian border (I-95 ends at mm 303)

stops.name: Houlton Visitor Information Center Rest Area (SB only)
stops.notes: At the Canadian border, serves traffic entering from New Brunswick; truck parking, no fuel
